name: Cloud SQL instance does not require SSL/TLS connections
description: The Cloud SQL instance does not enforce SSL/TLS for client connections. Without mandatory SSL, credentials and query data are transmitted in plaintext, vulnerable to network interception. This affects MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server instances.
remediation: Enforce SSL by setting sslMode to ENCRYPTED_ONLY in the instance IP configuration, or enable the requireSsl flag: Cloud Console → SQL → Connections → SSL → Allow only SSL connections. Download and configure SSL certificates for all clients. For PostgreSQL, also set ssl=on in pg_hba.conf.
